mapper.sql: id, wallet_id, member_id, flow_type, change_amount, before_balance, after_balance, biz_type, biz_id, remark, created_by, created_at, out_order_no
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pt_member_wallet_flow (wallet_id, member_id, flow_type, change_amount, before_balance, after_balance, biz_type, biz_id, remark, created_by, out_order_no) VALUES (#{walletId}, #{memberId}, #{flowType}, #{changeAmount}, #{beforeBalance}, #{afterBalance}, #{bizType}, #{bizId}, #{remark}, #{createdBy}, #{outOrderNo})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM pt_member_wallet_flow WHERE out_order_no = #{outOrderNo} LIMIT 1
